metadata.title: Ring My Bell
metadata.lyrics:
[01:02.06] I'm glad you're home
[01:05.85] Now did you really miss me?
[01:09.74] I guess you did by the look in your eye
[01:14.00] (Look in your eye, look in your eye)
[01:17.06] Well lay back and relax, while I put away the dishes
[01:23.61] (Put away the dishes)
[01:25.08] Then you and me can rock a bell
[01:31.84] You can ring my bell, ring my bell
[01:39.39] You can ring my bell, ring my bell
[01:47.22] You can ring my bell, ring my bell
[01:54.85] You can ring my bell, ring my bell
[02:03.32] The night is young and full of possibilities
[02:10.81] Well come on and let yourself be free
[02:19.06] My love for you (love for you, love for you)
[02:22.66] So long I've been savin'
[02:26.45] Tonight was made for me and you
[02:32.92] You can ring my bell, ring my bell (ring my bell, ding-dong-ding)
[02:40.78] You can ring my bell, ring my bell (ring my bell, ring-a-ling-a-ling)
[02:48.23] You can ring my bell, ring my bell (ring my bell, ding-dong-ding)
[02:55.99] You can ring my bell, ring my bell (ring my bell, ring-a-ling-a-ling)
[03:14.08]

[03:24.12] Ding, dong, ding, ah-ah, ring it
[03:28.17] You can ring my bell, anytime, anywhere
